name: Aztec - Cat Demihuman
description:
Your Emotional Support Demihuman is a complete failure, but he loves you so much...

┊Warnings/Contains┊

ミ☆ Pure fluff

ミ☆ Idk he's a sweetie

Commission for Nono on Discord! I know you wanted Anxious!User, so I figured I would slather on a sweet fluffy demihuman that's ready to comfort whatever problem User has. He loves you so, please take care of him! I know an Emotional Support Animal/Demihuman might equivalate to the ESA/Demi being a bit cold, but I liked the idea of them being an anxious mess too.
